Record Your Screen with
Zero Compromise

ScreenCast Studio is a free screen recorder for Chrome & Edge. Capture your desktop, windows, or browser tabs with system audio and microphone — all processed locally, nothing uploaded.

Features

Everything you need to record

Powerful recording features wrapped in a clean, intuitive interface. No ads, no spyware, no hidden costs.

Flexible Recording Sources

Capture your entire desktop, a specific application window, or a single browser tab. Switch sources with one click.

System Audio + Microphone

Record application sounds and your voice simultaneously. Perfect for tutorials, presentations, and gameplay commentary.

One-Click Download

Videos are generated in your browser and saved directly to your device. No cloud uploads, no waiting, no sign-up.

WebM to MP4 Conversion

Built-in converter transforms WebM recordings to universally compatible MP4 format — no extra software needed.

Video Trimming PRO

Cut unwanted segments from your recordings. Drag the timeline handles to set the trim range and export only what matters.

Watermark Editor PRO

Add text or image watermarks with full control over position, size, color, opacity, and rotation. Save presets for reuse across recordings.

Privacy by Design

All recording data stays in your browser. We never upload, transmit, or share your screen content with any server.

12-Language Support

Full interface localization in English, Chinese, Arabic, Spanish, French, German, Hindi, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese, Russian, and Bengali.

How It Works

Recording in 4 simple steps

From install to download in under a minute. No account required.

1

Add to Browser

Install from Chrome Web Store or Edge Add-ons with one click.

2

Choose Source

Select desktop, window, or tab. Toggle audio options.

3

Start Recording

Hit the record button and capture your screen in real time.

4

Edit & Download

Preview, trim unwanted segments, add watermarks, and download. Convert to MP4 if needed.

Pricing

Free forever, Pro when you need it

Start free with 360p/480p and 10-minute recordings. Upgrade once for unlimited everything.

Max recording duration 10 minutes Unlimited
License type Free forever One-time payment, lifetime
Future updates ✓ ✓
Get Started Free
Use Cases

Built for everyone

Whether you're teaching, presenting, or creating content, ScreenCast Studio has you covered.

Online Courses

Record lectures and tutorials with clear system audio for students.

Meeting Recording

Capture video calls and online meetings for later review or sharing.

Tutorial Creation

Walk through code demos, software features, and step-by-step guides.

Content Creation

Produce YouTube videos, demos, and social media content with audio narration.

Bug Reporting

Record screen to reproduce and document bugs for development teams.

Game Recording

Capture gameplay with system audio for streaming or highlights.

Privacy First

Your data never leaves your device

ScreenCast Studio processes all recordings locally in your browser. There are no servers, no cloud storage, and no tracking.

  • No data upload to any server
  • No analytics or tracking
  • No account or sign-up required
  • Explicit privacy consent on first use
FAQ

Frequently asked questions

Is ScreenCast Studio really free?

Yes! The free version includes full recording features with 360p/480p quality and up to 10-minute recordings. No watermark, no sign-up, no credit card. You only pay $19.99 once if you need 1080p quality and unlimited duration.

Does it upload my recordings to a server?

No. All screen and audio data is processed entirely in your browser. Recordings are only saved when you click the download button, and they go directly to your local device. We have no servers that receive your recording data.

What browsers are supported?

ScreenCast Studio works on Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and other Chromium-based browsers. Firefox support is also available via Mozilla Add-ons (AMO). The extension requires Manifest V3 compatible browser.

Can I record system audio and microphone at the same time?

Yes. Enable both "System Audio" and "Microphone" in the recording settings. The extension automatically mixes both audio sources into a single track. Note: for system audio, you must also check "Share audio" in the browser's screen sharing dialog.

What video formats are supported?

Recordings are saved in WebM format by default. The extension includes a built-in WebM-to-MP4 converter that re-encodes the video using Canvas + MediaRecorder, so you can get MP4 files without installing any additional software.

Can I trim my recordings?

Yes! Video trimming is a Pro feature. After recording, click "Trim Video" to open the trim editor. Drag the start and end handles on the timeline to select the segment you want to keep, then click "Apply Trim" to generate the trimmed video. The original recording is preserved.

Can I add watermarks to my videos?

Yes! The Watermark Editor is a Pro feature. Click "Edit Watermarks" to open the visual editor, where you can add text or image watermarks, drag them to position on a live preview, and adjust font, size, color, opacity, and rotation. Save watermark presets for reuse, and apply them automatically when downloading. Watermarks are burned into the video using Canvas-based rendering for pixel-perfect accuracy.

Is the $19.99 Pro license a subscription?

No, it's a one-time payment. You pay once and get a lifetime license with unlimited recording quality, unlimited duration, and all future updates. No recurring fees, no subscriptions.

What languages are supported?

The interface is fully localized in 12 languages: English, Chinese (Simplified), Arabic, Spanish, French, German, Hindi, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese (Brazilian), Russian, and Bengali. The extension auto-detects your browser language.

Start recording in 30 seconds

Free forever. No watermark. No sign-up. Just click and record.
